qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Out-of-bounds array index in RPC Return handler crashes the RPC session
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes UB in constant::Reader::get and StructSchema::new via PointerReader::get_root_unchecked in the capnp crate. This finding is about a missing bounds check on answer_id in the capnp-rpc Return handler — a different crate (capnp-rpc vs capnp), different vulnerable code path (rpc.rs Return handler vs constant/StructSchema constructors), and different root cause (unchecked Vec index vs unchecked pointer/root construction).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes undefined behavior in constant::Reader::get and StructSchema::new via PointerReader::get_root_unchecked in the capnp crate (CWE-758). The rpc_return_oob_index_crash finding targets a different crate (capnp-rpc) and a different root cause (missing bounds check on answer_id in the RPC Return handler).
evidence: Advisory: UB in constant::Reader::get and StructSchema::new via PointerReader::get_root_unchecked in capnp crate, CWE-758
rpc_return_oob_index_crash: OOB Vec index in capnp-rpc/src/rpc.rs Return handler — different crate, different root cause
